retry_reason: Function failures (allocation, devres add) are unrelated to refcount; the kref_init never fails. Retry is possible for transient allocation failures but not relevant to refcount semantics.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is allocation and initialization of a drm_panel, not just refcount management. It performs memory allocation, field setup, devres registration, and calls drm_panel_init; kref_init is one step among many, making the refcount operation incidental to broader business logic.
